# Human-Readable Client Handoff Template

## What this system is
Explain the system in plain English.

## What it does every day
Explain the daily operation in plain English.

## What humans still need to do
List the remaining human responsibilities.

## What the operator should check
- summaries
- blockers
- quarantined items
- approvals
- system health

## What happens when something fails
Explain the fallback and recovery path in plain English.

## What should never be changed casually
List protected system areas.

## Who to call or notify
List owners and escalation path.
